deviceSettings.description1: Here are all the devices that are currently logged in with your account. You can log out of each one individually.
deviceSettings.description2: If you see an entry you don’t recognise, log out of that device and change your account password immediately.

autoStart.title: Auto start application
autoStart.description: Automatically launch the app when your computer starts so it's ready to use right away.

hardwareAcceleration.title: Use graphics acceleration when available
hardwareAcceleration.description: When enabled, the app will leverage your GPU (graphics card) to handle intensive graphics tasks like 3D rendering and video decoding. This improves frame rates and interface responsiveness. If you experience display issues or app crashes, try disabling this feature to improve stability.

autoHidden.title: Hidden start application with os
autoHidden.description: Starts hidden when the app launches with the OS..

activity.title: Show My Activity
activity.description: Show your current activities to friends. This lets them see what you're up to and makes it easier to connect.

supportSettings.title: Support
supportSettings.uploadLog: Upload debug logs to Mezon Support

updateGate.updateExperience: A quick update is needed to continue using our latest family features.

micTest.title: Mic Test
micTest.description: Having mic issues? Start a test and say something fun — we'll play your voice back to you.

errors.permissionDenied: Microphone permission is required to run mic test.

warnings.outputNotSupported: Your browser does not support selecting output device. Speaker selection may be ignored.

logOutPopup.description: Please confirm if you would like to log out?
